aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as schema markup and localized service pages, but lacks depth in content, reviews, and structured data optimization.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to collect and display customer feedback.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords for each service area.
Enhance content with location-specific HVAC tips and detailed service descriptions.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes localized service pages for cities like Inglewood and Torrance.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has a good start with localized service pages, but it needs to expand its geographic targeting and improve the depth of local content.
critical_issues: Lack of content specific to each service area beyond basic contact information.
No structured data for local business or service areas.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent or missing NAP (Name, Address, Phone) citations across the web, which affects local search visibility.
action_items: Claim and verify the Google Business Profile listing.
Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Create and optimize listings on major local business directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of comprehensive local content and structured data for each service area.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in specific neighborhoods or with detailed service requirements.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding schema markup for reviews and services to improve search engine understanding of the content.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating detailed, location-specific blog posts and service pages to establish the business as a local HVAC authority.

page_title: 74degreesheatandair - AC in Inglewood and surrounding cities
